description_long: This shotgun features a robust design with a metallic barrel and receiver, accented by gold-colored bands and fittings. The stock is crafted to resemble polished wood, with a pronounced grip and a flat, angular butt plate. A large, cylindrical scope or sight is mounted atop the receiver, secured by metallic brackets. The barrel is wide and flared at the muzzle, giving it a distinctive blunderbuss-like appearance. The trigger guard is metallic and curves smoothly around the trigger, providing ample space for finger placement. The overall aesthetic combines industrial metalwork with classic wood elements, suggesting a blend of traditional and steampunk influences.
description: A metallic shotgun with a wide flared barrel, gold accents, and a wood-textured stock, featuring a large mounted scope and a curved trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wood-textured stock, gold and silver metallic body, large scope, and flared barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, flared muzzle and the circular opening of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the scope and trigger guard visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the stock and the alignment of the scope with the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, wide flared muzzle with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic guard with a smooth curve and no finger grooves
